title: Lesson 71: (Grammar) - polite present/future negative verb ending; does n...

intro_cards.title: Polite Negative: ません
intro_cards.body:
ません is the polite present/future negative verb ending.

Formation: [verb stem] + ません
• 食べません (don't eat) • 話しません (don't speak) • しません (don't do)

• 肉は食べません。(I don't eat meat.)
• 明日は来ません。(I won't come tomorrow.)

Four ます-family forms:
• ます (present/future)
• ません (present/future negative)
• ました (past)
• ませんでした (past negative)
